name: Natural
oneliner: Payment infrastructure purpose-built for agentic workflows — enabling AI agents to transact autonomously on behalf of businesses and consumers
finserv: Core product is financial infrastructure for agents; backed by fintech operators: Mercury, Ramp, Unit, Emprise Bank CEOs/CTOs
team: Strong fintech angel network (Mercury, Ramp, Unit, Vercel) as investors signals ecosystem credibility
thesis: If You becomes the regulated infrastructure layer for AI agents, those agents will need to make transactions. Natural is building the payment plumbing for exactly that use case, backed by the operators who built leading fintech companies.
